name: mobile-qa-framework
description: Mobile QA automation prototype framework — Ionic/Capacitor fitness app with Playwright + Appium test suites

scripts.test:perf: cd tests/performance && npx k6 run load-test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.report:generate: cd tests && npx allure generate reports/allure-results --clean -o reports/allure-report
scripts.report:open: cd tests && npx allure open reports/allure-report
